history.content:
<thought>
The goal O is visible ahead and to the right of my current position. The cell directly in front of me is safe, so I should move forward toward the open path.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell in front is a wall, so I cannot go straight. The goal is visible to my upper-right, and the cell to my right is lava, so turning toward it is unsafe. The safest useful move is to turn counter-clockwise to find a safe route around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. After turning counter-clockwise before, I likely need to keep adjusting to face a safe open corridor. The left side appears open, so I will turn counter-clockwise again to orient toward it.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell in front is a wall. The left side contains lava, so I should avoid turning or moving that way. The right side is also blocked by a wall. Since I cannot advance safely, I will turn clockwise to reorient and look for a safe path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The view shows open floor on both sides of me and a wall in front. Since I need to progress through the corridor, I should rotate to face one of the open side cells rather than the wall.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible ahead-right, but the cell directly in front is a lava cell, so moving forward would be fatal. I should avoid that and rotate to try to align with a safe path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
There is lava directly in front of me, so I must not go forward. The goal is visible to the left side, and the left turn seems to orient me toward the safer open corridor rather than the lava. I will rotate counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward with lava directly in front of me, so forward is unsafe. The goal is visible to the right, and turning clockwise should face me toward the open safe cell instead of the lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is safe floor, while lava is adjacent but not in my path. Moving forward is the best way to continue toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
